The Process

How Pre-Ordering Works

01
Choose Your Style & Size

Browse the collection and pick the trainer that's right for you. Every style is available in all UK sizes — no lottery, no rush.

02
Pay £10 Deposit

A £10 deposit locks in your order and triggers us to source your pair wholesale directly from the manufacturer. That's all you pay today.

03
We Source Your Trainers

We place your order with our manufacturer partners. The sourcing and shipping process takes up to 5 weeks from the date of your deposit payment.

04
Pay Balance, We Ship

Once your trainers are in our hands, we'll contact you to settle the remaining balance. As soon as payment is confirmed, we dispatch straight to your door.

£10
Deposit
to Secure

Our Model

You Only Pay £10 Today

Unlike other retailers, we don't take the full price upfront. Your £10 deposit is all that's needed to lock in your size — the rest is only due once your trainers have landed with us and are ready to ship.

  • £10 secures your chosen style and size immediately
  • Balance payment only when your trainers are ready
  • Up to 5 weeks from deposit to dispatch
  • All sizes available on every style listed
  • Trainers sourced wholesale direct from manufacturers
  • We'll keep you updated throughout the process
